elements.original_description: A sleek, shiny red sports car with clean lines and a glossy finish, positioned centrally on a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a sleek, shiny red sports car with clean lines and a glossy finish, positioned centrally on a pure white background. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks. Mood: admiring and appreciative.
